title: Denver's Missing Middle
short_description: An evolutionary mixed-income townhouse community for Denver's Globeville neighborhood, designed around modular bays, live/work options, and shared outdoor amenities.
role: Concept design, urban strategy, modular housing system, diagrams, plans, and AI-generated render coordination.
